title: tectaria ternifolia
intro: Tectaria ternifolia, also known as the Three-leaved Fern or Tern Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Tectaria ternifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
